title: FSSAI can't regulate animal feed: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court has quashed a requirement set by the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) that banned the use of meat or bone meal in feed meant for milk and meat-producing animals (except poultry, pigs, and fish).A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia reasoned that the FSSAI is not empowered to prescribe the standards of food meant for animal consumption. The Court underscored that the FSSAI’s mandate is confined to food mean
